waist-length waves catching unseen wind
baroque updo pierced with silver thorns
wild storm-tossed mane tangled with grief
razor-sharp bob framing angular jaw
thick rope-braid coiled like a serpent
rain-soaked strands plastered to pale throat
hip-length curtain of straight silk
crown of twisted braids wrapped like horns
voluminous natural curls defying gravity's pull
windswept nest of untamed witchy coils
shaved temples with long cascading top
damp tendrils clinging to nape and shoulders
floor-length heavy curls pooling like shadow
Victorian coiled chignon studded with mourning pins
tempest-wild tangles knotted with night blooms
severe cropped pixie revealing throat's curve
side-braid woven through with iron chains
water-slicked sheet clinging to spine's hollow
cascading loose waves brushing leather corset
elaborate twisted crown braided with bone
feral mane of thick coils catching moonlight
blunt shoulder-length cut swinging like blade
waist-grazing locs bound with velvet ribbon
finger-combed texturized waves falling past hips
tight coils springing wild from widow's peak
